faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our programs, enrollment process, and educational approach
faq.no_results.desc: We couldn't find any questions matching your search.
faq.q.enrollment.1: How do I enroll my child in a program?
faq.a.enrollment.1: Enrollment is simple! Visit our enrollment page, select your desired program, fill out the registration form, and complete the payment process.
faq.a.enrollment.2: You will need to provide a copy of your child's recent report card, a completed registration form, and emergency contact information.
faq.a.courses.1: We offer both online and hybrid learning options. Our online classes feature interactive live sessions with small class sizes.
faq.a.courses.2: We maintain small class sizes with a maximum of 12 students to ensure personalized attention.
faq.q.competitions.1: What competitions do you prepare for?
faq.a.competitions.1: We prepare students for international competitions including CIMOC, PHIMO, AMC, and various national science olympiads.
faq.a.competitions.2: Yes, for qualified students selected through our process, we cover all competition registration fees.
faq.a.pricing.1: Yes, we offer flexible payment plans including monthly and semester options.
faq.a.pricing.2: We offer merit-based scholarships for exceptional students and need-based financial assistance.
faq.q.general.1: What age groups do you cater to?
faq.a.general.1: We offer programs for students from elementary school through high school (ages 6-18).
